laws.title: Public Law 28-197 | Amending Public Law 27-196
laws.status_basis: The source is intact and operative. It amends Public Law 27-196 Section VI(b) and VI(b)(i) and does not repeal itself or create standalone Code text.
laws.chronology: No later enactment in the reviewed materials displaces this act; it remains a current amendment to a prior public law.
laws.repeal_transfer_redesignation: Direct amendment of Public Law 27-196 only; no transfer or redesignation chain was resolved.

current_implementation.detail: No dedicated XML note matching this act was found in the current tree or in origin/main. The branch changes do not show a distinct codification entry for the Public Law 27-196 amendment.

recommended_actions: Record the Section VI(b) and VI(b)(i) amendment as a concise statutory note tied to Public Law 27-196.
Do not create a new U.S. Code section.
Keep the act marked current.
